name: Chicken Czardas
recipeIngredient: 3 boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into strips
1 cup sherry or dry white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt diet margarine in a nonstick skillet over medium heat.
2. Add chicken and season with salt. Cook, stirring constantly for 3 minutes.
3. Add onion and mushrooms. Continue stirring for 2 more minutes.
4. Add sherry or white wine to the skillet.
5. In a separate cup, blend arrowroot powder and water until smooth.
6. Pour the mixture into the skillet and stir rapidly.
7. Cook until thickened. Stir in yogurt and paprika.
8. Heat through but do not boil. Serve with noodles and vegetables.
